positive: A stylized, highly detailed illustration of a whimsical, glowing neon mountain range at twilight, rendered in a vintage mid-century modern aesthetic. The scene features bold, clean silhouettes of stylized mountains, interspersed with geometric, glowing flora and fantastical river structures. Primary colors are deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and warm gold accents. The composition is highly centralized and balanced, designed for a repeat or patch-style print on fabric. Lighting should be dramatic and atmospheric, emphasizing high contrast between the glowing neon elements and the deep blue night sky. Clean linework, vector-art quality, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, watermark, text, low quality, noise, artifacts, ugly, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, blurry, amateur, signature, cropped, poorly drawn
